Escalation Matrix

Severity L1 (Initial) ACK SLA L2 (Escalation) Resolve SLA L3 (Management) Final Escalation Channels
Critical On-duty dispatcher 5 min Fleet Mgr + Owner 30 min CEO / MD 1 hour All channels
High Fleet Manager 15 min Ops Head 2 hours Owner 4 hours In-app, Push, Email
Medium Assigned ops staff 1 hour Fleet Manager 8 hours Ops Head 24 hours In-app, Email
Low Assigned ops staff 4 hours Fleet Manager 24 hours — 48 hours In-app only
Info Notification only — — Auto-close 7d — — In-app only

On-Duty Rotation Schedule

Mon–Fri (Day)
PM
Priya Menon 8 AM – 8 PM
Mon–Fri (Night)
RG
Rahul Gupta 8 PM – 8 AM
Saturday
VS
Vikram Singh 8 AM – 8 PM
Sunday / Holiday
DA
Dispatch Auto-assign 24 hours

Notification Channel Settings

In-app notifications Always on Cannot disable
Push notifications Enabled Per-user opt-in/out
SMS (Msg91) Enabled Critical only by default
WhatsApp Business Enabled WABA template approved
Email (SendGrid) Enabled Digest: hourly for Medium+
Webhook Configured POST to ops dashboard
Client portal alerts Enabled Delay + delivery alerts only
